    <item>
        <guid>nba530476</guid>
        <title>Chet Holmgren: Flirts with double-double in Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/chet-holmgren-5697</link>
        <description>Holmgren totaled 22 points (7-11 FG, 3-5 3Pt, 5-7 FT), nine rebounds, three assists, four steals and two blocks in 33 minutes during Thursday's 125-107 victory in Game 2 of the Western Conference Semifinals against the Lakers.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 07 May 2026 9:44:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530475</guid>
        <title>Austin Reaves: Pops for 31 points in Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/austin-reaves-5334</link>
        <description>Reaves finished with 31 points (10-16 FG, 3-6 3Pt, 8-10 FT), two rebounds and six assists across 38 minutes during Thursday's 125-107 loss in Game 2 of the Western Conference Semifinals against the Thunder.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 07 May 2026 9:35:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530474</guid>
        <title>Cade Cunningham: Provides spark in fourth quarter</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cade-cunningham-5336</link>
        <description>Cunningham produced 25 points (7-14 FG, 3-6 3Pt, 8-8 FT), four rebounds, 10 assists, one steal and two blocks across 42 minutes during Thursday's 107-97 victory in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals against Cleveland.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 07 May 2026 7:05:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530473</guid>
        <title>Donovan Mitchell: Puts up 31 points in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/donovan-mitchell-4166</link>
        <description>Mitchell collected 31 points (11-24 FG, 2-9 3Pt, 7-9 FT), six rebounds, three assists and two steals over 37 minutes during Thursday's 107-97 loss to the Pistons in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 07 May 2026 6:59:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530467</guid>
        <title>Ayo Dosunmu: Questionable for Game 3</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/ayo-dosunmu-5337</link>
        <description>Dosunmu (heel) is questionable for Friday's Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals against the Spurs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 07 May 2026 3:06:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
